summary: Critical failures: Workflow doesn't create act-result.txt (required artifact) or implement test harness (run each case via act, capture output, assert exact values). Missing fixture files and matrix-generator.test.ts referenced but not provided. Bash scripts lack `set -euo pipefail`. Workflow extracts COMBINATIONS variables but never asserts on them. Python3 used unnecessarily to parse JSON. Repetitive matrix-generation steps (lines 23-43) should be factored into composite action or helper script. TypeScript implementation is solid (good types, error handling, modular), but workflow is incomplete and unshippable as-is.
